1.png |type=Online |team_number=19 |series=GTV Weekly Wars |organizer= CriticalX |organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/criticalxgg |sponsor=[https://www.instagram.com/gametvindia/ game.tv India] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=2,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-08-30 |edate=2021-09-01 |facebook=gametvIn |web=https://www.game.tv/ |instagram=gametvindia |youtube=c/CriticalXBGMI |youtube2=channel/UCLuiZHzF4JNDlH3raEp6hOA |twitter= |discord=gametvin }} '''[https://www.instagram.com/gametvindia/ game.tv India]''' in association with '''[https://www.instagram.com/criticalxgg/ CriticalX]''' present the first season of the BGMI tournament ''game.tv Weekly Wars'' called the '''''game.tv Weekly Wars Season 1''''' with a prize pool of ₹2,00,000 INR. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Prasad|b1flag=in |b2=Sanjeev|b2flag=in }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''game.tv Weekly Wars Season 1:''' 21st August 2021 to 12th September 2021''. * '''''Qualifiers:''' 20th August 2021 to 22nd August 2021'' ** '' A total of 150 teams will play in the Qualifiers ** '' Teams to be divided into 6 groups with 25 teams per group''. ** '' Each team will get to play a single match'' ** '' Top 10 Teams from each group will qualify for the Quarter Finals''. ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 60 teams}} advance to Quarter Finals.'' * '''''Quarter Finals:''' 23rd August 2021'' ** '' A total of 60 teams will play in the Quarter Finals'' ** '' Teams to be divided into 4 groups''. ** '' Each team will get to play a total of 2 matches'' ** '' Top 5 Teams from each group will qualify for the Semi Finals''. ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 15 teams}} advance to Semi Finals.'' * '''''Semi Finals:''' 25th August 2021'' ** '' A total of 20 teams will play in the Semi Finals'' ** '' Each team will get to play a total of 3 matches'' ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 4 teams from the overall standings}} advance to Finals.'' * '''''Finals:''' 29th August 2021'' ** '' A total of 20 teams (4 Qualified from Semi Finals + 16 Invited) will play in the Finals'' ** '' Each team will get to play a total of 4 matches'' ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 5 teams from the overall standings}} advance to Grand Finals.'' * '''''Grand Finals:''' 30th August 2021 to 1st September 2021'' ** '' A total of 18 teams (5 Qualified + 14 Invited) will play in the Grand Finals'' ** '' Teams will get to play a total of 8 matches in a period of 3 days'' ====Matchdays==== * ''3 Matchdays: 2 Matches Each Day 1&2 and 4 Macthes on Day 3.'' ** '''''Day-1''''': ''E>>M'' ** '''''Day-2''''': ''E>>M'' ** '''''Day-3''''': ''E>>M>>E>>M'' ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable"
